title: valerianella angulosa
intro: Valerianella angulosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae, commonly known as the pointed cornsalad. It is a biennial or perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Valerianella angulosa include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Valerianella angulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in topical applications, such as creams and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
